verdict_reasoning: HSPA1A encodes the inducible HSP70 chaperone, canonically cytosolic. However, heat shock proteins including HSP70 family members are well-documented to translocate to the outer leaflet of the plasma membrane under stress conditions (heat shock, hypoxia, oxidative stress) and are prominently displayed on the surface of tumor/transformed cells (cancer-cell ecto-HSP70). This cancer-cell and stress-induced surface pool is the basis for multiple cell-surface-directed therapeutic programs (antibodies, ADC, NK-cell engagement targeting surface HSP70). This qualifies as contextual / cell_state_induced — surface display is real but restricted to stress or oncogenic transformation states.
